zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理格局
zh.content:
当前ETH价格围绕1705附近窄幅震荡，整体呈现高位横盘后的弱势整理结构，多空动能趋于平衡，短线方向不明，等待区间突破确认

MACD指标仍处于轻微负值区域，空头动能略占优势，但幅度有限；价格站稳SMA20上方，短期支撑有效，整体仍偏震荡运行结构

下方关键支撑位于1702与1700区域，若失守或回踩加深；上方1710.59为短线阻力，突破或指向1720，区间内仍以震荡为主

建议以区间交易为主，低吸靠近1700附近，高抛接近1710上方，严格设置止损防止假突破，保持轻仓操作，控制风险优先避免追涨杀跌

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently moving in a tight consolidation phase around 1706, with price action hovering just above the short-term mean near 1702. The structure suggests a weak bearish bias after a mild rejection from the 1710 zone. Momentum is muted, and volatility has compressed, indicating the market is waiting for a catalyst. Overall trend remains sideways with a slight downward tilt in the very short term.

The MACD reading at -0.66 confirms modest bearish momentum, though not strong enough to signal an impulsive breakdown. With RSI unavailable, price behavior around the SMA(20) becomes more important. Trading slightly above the moving average suggests buyers are still defending the mid-range, but lack conviction. This creates a balanced but fragile environment where small shifts in volume could quickly define direction.

Key support is forming at 1704–1702, aligning with the intraday low and SMA(20). A breakdown below this zone could expose 1695 and then 1688 as the next liquidity pockets. On the upside, immediate resistance sits at 1710–1712, followed by a stronger barrier near 1720, where prior rejections likely cluster. The range remains narrow, favoring range-bound strategies over breakout chasing.

From a trading perspective, short-term participants may consider buying near support with tight risk controls, targeting a rotation back toward 1710. Conversely, rejection at resistance could offer short opportunities back into the 1702 area. Until a clear breakout above 1720 or breakdown below 1700 occurs, Ethereum is likely to remain in a low-volatility equilibrium zone.
